name: universal-semantic-video
description: Universal Semantic Video (USV) sidecar schema and validation tools.

scripts.validate:samples: npm run build && node dist/cli.js validate examples/lite/airport-scene.usv.json && node dist/cli.js validate examples/lite/audio-visual-announcement.usv.json && ! node dist/cli.js validate examples/invalid/missing-version.usv.json && node dist/cli.js conformance examples/lite/airport-scene.usv.json && node dist/cli.js conformance examples/lite/audio-visual-announcement.usv.json && ! node dist/cli.js conformance examples/invalid/broken-reference.usv.json
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run validate:samples && npm run check:public
